rationale.D1: Confirmed command-based baseline structure (Tank extends SubsystemBase, commands/ dir, RobotContainer) but all method bodies are empty stubs with no hardware wiring or IO interfaces; discounted the SwerveDrivePoseEstimator import in Tank.java as it is unreachable dead code in an otherwise empty class.
rationale.D2: RobotContainer.configureBindings() is empty and Teleop.execute() is an empty stub — command composition structure is present in name only; no button bindings, no coordination, no state logic confirmed used.
rationale.D3: No simulationPeriodic, no sim classes, no WPILib physics sim imports in any file; discounted nothing because nothing is present.
rationale.D4: No src/test directory exists; CI workflow runs './gradlew build' (compile-only, not './gradlew test'), so no tests are executed anywhere.
rationale.D5: SmartDashboard is imported in Tank.java and Teleop.java but both class bodies are empty stubs with no put* calls; no logging framework of any kind confirmed used.
rationale.D6: RobotContainer.getAutonomousCommand() returns Commands.print("No autonomous command configured"); no path files, no PathPlanner, no Choreo in the season repo.
rationale.D7: SwerveDrivePoseEstimator is imported in Tank.java but the class body is entirely empty with no field declarations or method implementations; discounted as unused import in a scaffold.
rationale.D8: Confirmed CI workflow on season repo (build job on push/PR), a maintained library org 'Core-System' with a full IO-layer template (ExampleSubsystemIO, SwerveModuleIO, GyroIO with Real/Sim impls), and training repos across 2022-2025 seasons; library is a copy-paste template repo not a versioned dependency so capped at 3.
